p2p_enrich.notes: Docker build failed due to git config ordering issue (config must be set before commit). CI commands discovered from package.json: yarn lint (ESLint), yarn flow-ci (Flow type checking), yarn test (Jest tests). Added 2 pass_to_pass tests: test_repo_lint and test_repo_flow. Did NOT add yarn test as full suite because it would be too slow - the existing repo_tests test already uses targeted Jest patterns.

validate.notes: Fixed 2 issues: (1) Dockerfile git config ordering - moved git config user.email/user.name BEFORE git commit, (2) test_outputs.py blob_validation test - added JSON parsing to detect when Jest skips all tests (test does not exist on base commit). All 4 checks now pass: Docker build, NOP test (reward=0), Gold test (reward=1), Rubric judge (1.0).
